description: A planner must deconflict the flight paths of a strike package, an ISR drone, and a refueling tanker in a compressed airspace.

nodes.task_description: Input the mission parameters, timings, and desired flight paths for all three assets.

expected_outcome.expected: Planner accurately enters all required data into the planning system.

nodes.task_description: Run the deconfliction tool to identify any potential conflicts in time, space, or altitude.

expected_outcome.expected: The tool correctly identifies several potential conflicts.

nodes.task_description: Adjust the flight paths, timings, or altitudes of the assets to resolve all identified conflicts.

expected_outcome.expected: Planner creates a new plan where all assets can operate safely.
